description: Improved Qwen full embedding classifier. Starts from setup104-qwen, keeps [response_emb | qwen_emb | delta_qwen], recenters the Qwen delta by the mean negative-class residual, appends abs(delta), cosine(response, qwen), and ||delta||, and selects the logistic-regression C/class-weight combination on validation Macro F1. Frozen encoder, no fine-tuning. Trainer type: embedding_classifier.
